headline: Athene Announces First Quarter 2026 Fixed Income Investor Call
summary: WEST DES MOINES, Iowa, April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Athene, a subsidiary of Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE:APO), announced it will host a Fixed Income Investor call on Friday, May 15, 2026 at 10:00AM ET. The call will feature members of Athene’s senior management team, who will provide an update on current business trends, new business origination, the investment portfolio, and capital. An accompanying presentation, live webcast, and webcast replay will be available on the Investor R

headline: Top US Insurance Regulator Warns Private Capital's Push Into Retirement Funds Is Creating Risks Retirees Can't See: Report
summary: U.S. regulator warns insurers' shift to private credit and offshore reinsurance may raise risks for retirement savings.
